title: EARLY LEARNING HUB - 211info
text: EARLY LEARNING HUB OF LINN, BENTON, AND LINCOLN COUNTIES EARLY LEARNING HUB Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Connects families to partnering agencies to ensure that children are ready for kindergarten. 6500 Pacific Boulevard SW LM-132 Albany, OR 97321 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-4:30pm Email (541) 917-4922 . Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 917-4922 Enrollment Specialists Kristi Collins [email protected] Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Benton, Lincoln, and Linn Counties Services: School Readiness Programs Other Services Offered At This Location: INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - POLLYWOG PUBLIC ASSISTANCE PROGRAMS - PRESCHOOL PROMISE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
